title: vitis amurensis var. glabrescens
intro: Vitis amurensis var. glabrescens is a plant species known as the Amur grape, a variety of the Amur grapevine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Vitis amurensis var. glabrescens include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
